LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INCORPORATED'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION TO VACATE THE AMENDED JUDGMENT SIGNED BY JUDGE BUSCH AS PART OF ITS' SUPERVISORY POWER. PLAINTIFF HAS PRESENTED FACTS TO DECLARE IT NULL AND VOID. MOOT AS TO QUIET TITLE AND THE EFFECT OF WHICH IS TO RETURN TO THE JUDGMENT SIGNED BY COMMISSIONER GARGANO. OBJECTION TO JUDICIAL NOTICE IS SUSTAINED WHICH IS NOT PART OF THE OFFICIAL COURT RECORD. REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IS GRANTED AS TO THOSE DOCUMENTS THAT ARE RECORDED. THE REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE IS DENIED. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER PURSUANT TO CCP 437 C(G). JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Production Of Documents In Response To Demand For Inspection, Set One; And For Sanction To Dismiss With Prejudice Mers Frivolous Action To Quiet Title
Off Calendar Jan-27-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Theresa Murphy, Defendant in Propria Persona
Peter Karl Wolff, Jr., Atty. for Plaintiff and Opposing party: Mortgage Electronic Registration Systems, Inc.

RULING: MATTER WAS ARGUED AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED AND MODIFIED: Defendant THERESA MURPHY's Motion To Compel Production Of Documents In Response To Demand For Inspection, Set On; And For Sanctions Of Dismissal Of Plaintiff's Action To Quiet Title is denied. The responses to Numbers 1-6 and 8-13 are sufficient. The court cannot order the production of documents which have not been located after diligent search and reasonable inquiry. The motion is denied as to No. 7 as no legal basis has been offered in support of the request.

The motion is denied as it seeks dismissal of the action. This is not a motion for summary adjudication and there has been no violation of the requirements of the discovery statutes.
Late opposition has been considered.

MODIFICATION: To require that the responses be supplemented to comply with the provisions of 2031.230.

COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
